info.name: Facebook Business Manager Facebook Marketing API
Campaigns
Facebook Business Manager List campaigns

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects to return per page. Default is 25.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for pagination to retrieve the next page of results

params.name: filtering
params.description: Filters to apply to the campaign list. Accepts JSON array of filter objects with field, operator, and value.

items.docs: Retrieves all campaigns for the specified ad account. Returns a paginated list of campaign objects with their configurations and status information.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Create a campaign

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

items.docs: Creates a new advertising campaign in the specified ad account. Requires at minimum a name, objective, and status.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Get a campaign

params.name: campaign_id
params.description: The ID of the campaign

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific campaign by its ID, including configuration, status, and objective.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Update a campaign

params.name: campaign_id
params.description: The ID of the campaign

items.docs: Updates an existing campaign. Supports modifying name, status, budget, and other campaign-level settings.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Delete a campaign

params.name: campaign_id
params.description: The ID of the campaign

items.docs: Deletes an advertising campaign. This sets the campaign status to DELETED and it will no longer serve ads.

info.name: Ad Sets
Facebook Business Manager List ad sets

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects to return per page. Default is 25.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for pagination to retrieve the next page of results

items.docs: Retrieves all ad sets for the specified ad account. Returns targeting, budget, scheduling, and optimization configurations.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Create an ad set

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

items.docs: Creates a new ad set within a campaign. Defines targeting, budget, schedule, optimization goal, and bid strategy.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Get an ad set

params.name: ad_set_id
params.description: The ID of the ad set

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific ad set including targeting, budget, scheduling, and optimization settings.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Update an ad set

params.name: ad_set_id
params.description: The ID of the ad set

items.docs: Updates an existing ad set. Supports modifying targeting, budget, schedule, and optimization settings.

info.name: Ads
Facebook Business Manager List ads

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects to return per page. Default is 25.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for pagination to retrieve the next page of results

items.docs: Retrieves all ads for the specified ad account. Returns ad configurations including creative associations and status.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Create an ad

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

items.docs: Creates a new ad within an ad set. Associates an ad creative with targeting and delivery settings defined at the ad set level.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Get an ad

params.name: ad_id
params.description: The ID of the ad

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific ad including its creative, status, and configuration.

info.name: Ad Creatives
Facebook Business Manager List ad creatives

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects to return per page. Default is 25.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for pagination to retrieve the next page of results

items.docs: Retrieves all ad creatives for the specified ad account.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Create an ad creative

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

items.docs: Creates a new ad creative with image, video, copy, and call-to-action configurations for use in ads.

info.name: Ad Accounts
Facebook Business Manager Get ad account details

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific ad account including settings, spend limits, and status information.

info.name: Custom Audiences
Facebook Business Manager List custom audiences

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects to return per page. Default is 25.

params.name: after
params.description: Cursor for pagination to retrieve the next page of results

items.docs: Retrieves all custom audiences for the specified ad account. Returns audience configurations and approximate sizes.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Create a custom audience

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

items.docs: Creates a new custom audience for ad targeting. Supports customer file audiences, website custom audiences, app activity audiences, and lookalike audiences.

info.name: Insights
Facebook Business Manager Get ad account insights

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

params.name: time_range
params.description: JSON object specifying the date range with since and until fields in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: breakdowns
params.description: Comma-separated list of breakdown dimensions such as age, gender, country, or placement.

params.name: level
params.description: Level of aggregation for results. Options include account, campaign, adset, or ad.

params.name: time_increment
params.description: Number of days for each increment in the time range, or use monthly or all_days.

items.docs: Retrieves performance insights and analytics for the specified ad account. Supports date range filtering, breakdowns, and action breakdowns.

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Get campaign insights

params.name: campaign_id
params.description: The ID of the campaign

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.

params.name: time_range
params.description: JSON object specifying the date range with since and until fields in YYYY-MM-DD format.

items.docs: Retrieves performance insights for a specific campaign including impressions, clicks, spend, and conversion metrics.

info.name: Ad Images
Facebook Business Manager Upload an ad image

params.name: ad_account_id
params.description: The ID of the ad account (numeric, without the act_ prefix)

items.docs: Uploads an image to the ad account image library for use in ad creatives. Accepts image file bytes.
